paywall.chooseToContinue: Choose a plan to keep using V&M Balance

lifetime.name: Pro Lifetime
lifetime.equivalent: 💡 Equivalent to ~16 months of Pro. Pays off in about a year and a half.

footer.secure: Secure payment via Stripe. Cancel anytime.
footer.signInOther: Sign in with a different account

workerData.title: Personal data processing
workerData.body: By entering personal data of a third party (name, contact, work hours, hourly rate) you confirm that you have a legal basis (contract, consent) and that you have informed that person about the processing.
workerData.notOfficialBody: Data is used solely for internal project tracking and does not constitute an official record under labour, accounting, or tax law.

onboarding.title: Quick start
onboarding.subtitle: Pick a project type — you can change name and budget in the next step.

projects.title: Projects
projects.name: Project Name
projects.contractValueHint: Amount you bill the client. If empty, total budget is used as expected revenue.

alerts.lossZone: Project {{name}} is entering the loss zone — only {{pct}}% margin left

forecast.title: 🔮 Forecast — at the current pace
forecast.noMilestones: Add project phases to see the forecast

projects.noProjectsHint: Create your first project to track budget and expenses
projects.noTransactionsHint: Add expenses or income related to the project
projects.noFundingHint: Link income sources to the project
projects.confirmDeleteMilestone: Are you sure you want to delete this milestone?
projects.fundingAlreadyExists: This source is already linked to the project
projects.confirmRemoveFunding: Are you sure you want to remove this funding source?
projects.confirmRemoveMember: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
projects.deleteConfirmMessage: This will permanently delete the project, all milestones and funding. Transactions will not be deleted.

contingency.help: A dedicated phase that holds 10% of the budget for unforeseen costs. Recommended.

revisions.title: Phase budget change
revisions.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Material price up 15%, extra labor...
revisions.reasonRequired: A reason for the budget change is required.
revisions.typeRequired: Select a change type (Scope change, Overrun, …).
revisions.coverage: How to cover the additional amount?
revisions.selectSourceRequired: Please select a source phase for the transfer.
revisions.scopeArgument: Of {{total}} in overruns, {{scope}} is from scope changes — argument for additional client billing.
revisions.reserveExhausted: The reserve has been fully used.
revisions.emptyHint: Every phase budget change is automatically recorded here for full transparency.
revisions.glowNear: Phase is near its budget limit
revisions.glowNearWithPct: Phase is near its budget limit ({{pct}}%)
revisions.planRevisedTooltip: Plan revised {{count}} time(s) — click for history
revisions.suggestReserveHelp: This phase is over 100% of budget. Reserve remaining: {{amt}}.
revisions.alertNearBody: Phase “{{name}}” has used {{pct}}% of its planned budget.

standup.title: Daily report
standup.subtitle: Say or type what was done on the project today. AI will structure workers, materials and key items.
standup.placeholder: e.g. Marko and Ivan worked 8h on plastering the ground floor. Used 12 bags of plaster and 3 m² of mesh...
standup.noVoice: Voice input is not supported on this device.
standup.materialsHint: Materials are informational — add as expense manually via Quick receipt.
standup.permissionDenied: Microphone access denied. Allow microphone in browser settings.
standup.iosNotSupported: Voice input doesn't work on iPhone Safari. Use the keyboard.
standup.startFailed: Could not start recording. Please try again.

projects.noProjectsBusiness: Create a new project or import from personal finances.
projects.migrateNoProfiles: You have no company yet. Create one in Settings → Business companies.
projects.dependencyNotCompleted: The previous milestone must be completed before starting this one

health.marginUnknown: Enter the contract value for accurate analysis

earnedValue.title: Earned Value
earnedValue.eacHint: Projection based on current spend rate
earnedValue.promptDesc: Without a contract value we can't calculate margin, EAC or loss risk.

quickPhoto.title: Quick receipt capture
quickPhoto.pickProject: Pick a project for the receipt
quickPhoto.hint: The receipt will be saved locally on your device.

documents.noDocumentsHint: Upload receipts, contracts or images for the project
documents.modeHint: Local = this device only · Cloud = shared with all members
documents.noPhotosHint: Take a progress photo or add from gallery
documents.photosHint: Photos are stored in cloud if the project is shared

projects.addMilestonesToSeeTimeline: Add milestones to see the timeline
projects.overBudgetDescription: Spending has exceeded received funds by

tooltips.team: Other app users with access to the project
tooltips.workers: Your employees (you manage them, pay them, track hours)
tooltips.collaborators: External subcontractors (other companies with agreed amounts)
tooltips.projectTeam: Everyone on the project: app members, workers and external collaborators

templates.suggestedPhases: Suggested phases for this project type (optional)
templates.help: A template only seeds an initial list of phases that you can change later. It does not change the project type.
templates.empty: We don't have suggested phases for this project type yet. You can add them manually or later.

projects.linkToExistingMemberHint: Link this worker record to an existing project member. All their past and future hour entries will be calculated.
projects.linkNotAuthorized: You don't have permission to link
projects.userAlreadyLinked: This member is already linked to another worker
projects.inviteWorkerHint: Generate a link and send it to the worker. When they open it and sign in, they're automatically linked to this record and can log their work — no paid plan needed.
projects.orSendByEmail: Or send the invite by email — works even if the person does not have an account yet.
projects.workerEmailSentNew: Invitation sent — the user will receive an email with a sign-up link
projects.alreadyMember: User is already a project member
projects.alreadyInvited: User already has a pending invitation
projects.invitationsDisabledClosed: Project is completed or archived — invitations are not allowed.

complete.step1Hint: Mark milestones that are actually done. Anything left unchecked stays open.
complete.step2Hint: Generate a final report before closing the books. You can download it as PDF or CSV.
complete.overdueWarn: You have {{count}} overdue milestones. Double-check before marking them complete.
complete.allDone: All milestones are already complete. You can move on.
complete.reportAck: I generated the final report or I don't need one.
complete.notePlaceholder: What went well, what to improve next time...
complete.optArchiveHint: Removes the project from the active list. You can restore it from Archive.
complete.optKeepHint: Status becomes Completed but stays visible on Projects.

advances.isAdvance: This is an advance to a collaborator
advances.isAdvanceHelp: Tick if this amount will be deducted from a later final invoice
advances.noUnlinked: No unlinked advances for this collaborator.
advances.surplusWarning: Advances exceed invoice by {{amount}} — a receivable from collaborator will be created.

errors.noCollaborator: Select the collaborator receiving this advance.
errors.zeroAmountWithLinks: Invoice amount cannot be 0 when advances are linked.

estimates.title: Quotes & Estimates
estimates.menuDesc: Prepare a quote and convert it into a project

legal.title: Legal documents (GDPR)
legal.intro: Generate a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) and a Privacy Notice for your workers/collaborators. Pre-filled with your company details.
legal.dpaDesc: For your records as Data Controller
legal.note: Documents are a starting point. For specific legal situations consult a lawyer.

settings.title: Settings
settings.soundNotificationsDesc: Play a sound for new notifications
settings.dailySummaryDesc: Every day at 9 PM if you had transactions.
settings.pushNotificationsDesc: Show notifications when the app is in background
settings.pushNotificationsWebHint: Push notifications are available in the Android app
settings.simpleModeDesc: Only wallet, transactions and net worth
settings.familyModeDesc: Family groups, shared accounts and chat
settings.familyDisableWarn1: Family groups will no longer appear in navigation
settings.familyDisableWarn2: Shared accounts, budgets and savings goals won't be visible
settings.familyDisableWarn3: Chat messages and notifications won't be received
settings.familyDisableKeep: Your data is preserved and will be available if you re-enable family mode.

settings.shareText: Download CostBuddy app for easy expense tracking!
settings.exportZipCloudOnly: ZIP export is available only in cloud mode
settings.exportBeforeDeleteDesc: We recommend exporting data before deleting your account to have a backup.
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently deletes all your data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.deleteConfirmDesc1: This action will permanently delete all your transactions, income sources, categories and other data. This cannot be undone.
settings.finalConfirmDesc: This is your last chance to back out. After clicking "Delete forever", all data will be permanently lost.
settings.noUndo: WARNING: This action CANNOT be undone!
settings.resetDataDesc: Deletes all transactions, projects and budgets. Wallets remain with their balances.
settings.resetWillKeep: Your wallets (payment sources) will remain with their balances.
settings.multiCurrencyDesc: Each payment source can have its own currency

usageProfile.confirmDesc: The Projects tab and all project-related suggestions will be hidden from navigation. Your existing projects and data are kept and will be available if you re-enable this option.

usageProfile.title: What do you want to track?
usageProfile.subtitle: We will tailor the app to your needs. You can change this later in Settings.
usageProfile.required: Please choose what you want to track

financeOnly.label: Personal finances only
financeOnly.desc: Track income, expenses and budgets. Ideal for personal use.

financeProjects.label: Finances + projects
financeProjects.desc: Everything above + manage projects, clients, workers and milestones. For freelancers, tradespeople and businesses.

plan.title: Choose a plan
plan.subtitle: You can start free and upgrade later.
plan.activateHint: Opens checkout in a new tab — onboarding stays preserved.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.subtitle: You're ready to manage your finances!

budget.title: Budgets
budget.noBudgetsHint: Use the button above to create your first budget
budget.deleteConfirmDesc: This action will permanently delete the budget "{{name}}" and all its category limits. This cannot be undone.
budget.autoRejectNote: Transactions not approved within 24 hours will be automatically rejected.
budget.viewerNote: Your transactions require approval from the budget owner

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.confirmDeleteAllDesc: All notifications will be permanently removed from this list. Existing invitations remain active — you can still accept them via the link the owner sent you.

installments.title: Installment Payments
installments.deleteConfirmMessage: This action will permanently delete the plan and all related installments. This cannot be undone.
installments.addHint: Add a new expense or income and select the "Installments" option

insights.positiveBalance: Great! Your balance is {{amount}} in the positive.
insights.negativeBalance: Watch out! Your balance is {{amount}} in the negative.
insights.spendingUp: You're spending {{percent}}% more this month than last month.
insights.spendingDown: Great job! You're spending {{percent}}% less than last month.
insights.lowSavings: You're only saving {{percent}}% of your income. Consider reducing expenses.
insights.highCategorySpending: {{percent}}% of expenses go to {{category}}. Maybe too much?
insights.motivation1: Every saving today is freedom tomorrow! 💪
insights.motivation2: Small steps lead to big goals! 🎯
insights.motivation3: You're in control of your finances - that's awesome! ⭐
insights.motivation4: Keep tracking your expenses, you're doing great! 🌟
insights.default: Tap for AI tips about your finances!

duplicates.foundSimilar: We found a similar transaction in your records. Are you sure you want to add a new one?

welcome.title: Welcome to V&M Balance! 👋
welcome.description: This short guide will show you the key features of the app. Let's get started!

summaryCards.title: Financial Overview 📊
summaryCards.description: Here you can see your total income, expenses, and current balance. Click on the cards for details.

addTransaction.title: Add Transactions ➕
addTransaction.description: Use these buttons to quickly add income, expenses, or transfers between accounts.

paymentSources.title: Payment Sources 💳
paymentSources.description: Manage your bank accounts, cards, and cash. Track the balance on each source.

transactions.title: Transaction List 📋
transactions.description: All your transactions in one place. Use filters for easier searching and select multiple transactions for bulk editing.

aiAssistant.title: AI Financial Assistant 🤖
aiAssistant.description: Your personal financial advisor! Ask questions about spending, get savings tips, and analyze your finances.

help.title: User Guide
help.intro: V&M Balance is an app for tracking personal finances. Here's how to use it:
help.addTransactionsStep1: Click the '+' button in the top right corner
help.addTransactionsStep2: Choose type: Income, Expense or Transfer
help.addTransactionsStep3: Enter amount, description, category and date
help.addTransactionsStep4: For expenses you can also add a receipt photo
help.transfersStep1: Transfers track money movements between your payment sources
help.transfersStep2: E.g. transfer from bank account to cash
help.transfersStep3: Transfers don't affect total balance - they only redistribute funds
help.paymentSourcesStep1: Create payment sources like: Salary, Cash, Revolut, etc.
help.paymentSourcesStep2: Each source has its own balance that updates automatically
help.paymentSourcesStep3: Income increases source balance, expenses decrease it
help.paymentSourcesStep4: Click on a source to see all related transactions
help.paymentSourcesStep5: Click the 'My Accounts' card for full view
help.sharedAccountsStep1: Share payment sources with other users
help.sharedAccountsStep2: Click the members icon (👥) on a payment source
help.sharedAccountsStep4: Members can add transactions to the shared account
help.sharedAccountsStep5: Comment on transactions by clicking the comment icon (💬)
help.categoriesStep1: Use built-in categories or create your own
help.categoriesStep2: Categories help track spending by groups
help.categoriesStep3: Click on a category to see all transactions in it
help.categoriesStep4: Create custom categories in the 'Custom Categories' section
help.projectsStep1: Create projects to track specific expenses
help.projectsStep2: Each project has a budget, milestones and timeline
help.projectsStep3: Add workers and track work hours per project
help.projectsStep4: Invite team members to collaborate on a project
help.budgetsStep4: Receive notifications when approaching or exceeding limits
help.installmentsStep2: Enter total amount, number of installments and first payment date
help.installmentsStep3: The app automatically generates the payment schedule
help.installmentsStep4: Remaining obligations reduce your Net Worth
help.filtersStep1: Filter transactions by type, category, payment source and date
help.filtersStep2: Use search to quickly find transactions
help.filtersStep3: Select multiple transactions at once using checkboxes
help.filtersStep4: Bulk change category, payment source or delete transactions
help.aiAssistantStep1: Click the AI avatar in the bottom right corner
help.aiAssistantStep2: Ask questions about your finances in natural language
help.aiAssistantStep3: AI analyzes your income, expenses, budgets and projects
help.aiAssistantStep4: Get savings tips and spending trend overview
help.aiAssistantStep5: You can enable/disable it in Settings
help.receiptScanningStep1: When adding an expense you can photograph the receipt
help.receiptScanningStep2: AI automatically recognizes the amount and merchant
help.receiptScanningStep3: The photo is saved with the transaction for later review
help.bankImportStep1: CSV statement import from most banks is supported
help.bankImportStep2: Click the 'Bank Connection' card on the home page
help.bankImportStep3: Select the CSV file and the bank it comes from
help.reportsStep1: Click the 'Reports' button for a detailed overview
help.reportsStep2: Review spending by categories and months
help.reportsStep3: Filter by date and export to PDF
help.notificationsStep1: Click the bell icon in the header to view notifications
help.notificationsStep2: Receive notifications about shared account invitations
help.notificationsStep3: Accept or decline invitations directly from notifications
help.notificationsStep4: Budget alerts arrive when approaching limits
help.tipContent: For the best experience, regularly enter transactions and categorize them. This way you'll have a clearer insight into your finances and make better decisions.
help.summaryStep1: At the top you see total income, expenses and balance
help.summaryStep2: Click any card for detailed transaction view
help.backupStep2: In local mode, data is stored on your device
help.backupStep3: In cloud mode, data is automatically synced
help.mobileInstallStep1: You can install the app as a mobile application
help.contactSupportDesc: Contact us directly — we reply within 24 hours.
help.openFullFaqDesc: Searchable knowledge base with 25+ questions and answers

storage.whereToStore: Where do you want to store your data?
storage.localDescription: Your data stays only on this device. Fast and private.
storage.cloudDescription: Sync your data across devices. Registration is required.
storage.googleDriveDescription: Store data in your own Google Drive account. Coming soon.
storage.icloudDescription: Store data in your own iCloud account on Apple devices. Coming soon.
storage.localInitError: Local storage could not be started. Please try again.
storage.privacyNotice: Your financial data is private. Local storage never leaves your device. Cloud options use encryption for data protection.

family.cloudOnly: Family dashboard is only available in cloud mode.

family.allProjectsAdded: All projects are already added to the group.

family.deleteGroupDesc: This will permanently delete the group and all its links to accounts and budgets. The accounts and budgets themselves will not be deleted.

family.allSavingsAdded: All savings goals are already added to the group.

payment.requirePaymentSource: Select a business payment source before saving.
payment.willCreateOwnerLoan: This will be recorded as an owner loan to the company.
payment.noBusinessSourcesHint: No business payment sources. Add one in Settings.

wallet.emptyHint: E.g. company current account, cash register, foreign currency account. Without a payment source the balance is not updated automatically.

quickCreate.title: New company

business.title: Business Profile

debts.changeSourceHint: Choose the company source this transaction will be charged to. The loan will be removed automatically.
debts.optionForgiveDesc: Owner donated to the company — transaction stays, obligation is gone.
debts.optionChangeSourceDesc: Move the transaction to a company source — loan disappears, expense remains only in the company.
debts.optionDeleteOnlyDesc: Removes only this entry — the transaction is untouched. For zombie/duplicate records.

vat.estimateNote: * Estimate based on 25% rate. Add VAT rate to transactions for more accurate calculation.

more.companyDataDesc: Name, Tax ID, address, IBAN and other data

more.workforceDesc: Worker records, hours and labor costs

gdpr.bannerText: This app uses localStorage and IndexedDB to store your settings and financial data on your device. We do not use marketing cookies or track your activities outside the app.
gdpr.bannerTextV2: We use cookies and local storage to run the app. Analytics and marketing cookies are only used with your consent. You can accept all, reject all, or customize.
gdpr.consentLabel: I accept the {link} and consent to the processing of personal data in accordance with GDPR regulations.

cat.necessaryDesc: Required for the app to work: login, security, language, PIN. Cannot be disabled.
cat.analyticsDesc: Error tracking (Sentry) to improve stability. No personal data collected.
cat.marketingDesc: We currently do not use marketing cookies. Reserved for future promotional activities.

t1.name: Ana M.
t1.text: Finally an app that handles both personal and business finances! The receipt scanner saves me hours every month.

t2.name: Marko K.
t2.text: We share a family budget and everyone can see where money goes. Game changer for our household.

t3.name: Ivan P.
t3.text: Project tracking and expense control are incredibly useful. I finally see where money goes on every project.

footer.desc: Your financial control center for personal and business finances.

s1.title: 1. Introduction
s1.p1: V&M Balance ("app", "we", "our") is a personal and business finance management application. By using the app, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please stop using the application.

s2.title: 2. Use of Service
s2.p1: You must be at least 16 years old to use the app. By registering, you confirm that your information is accurate. The following is prohibited:
s2.l1: Using the app for illegal purposes
s2.l2: Attempting unauthorized access to other users' data
s2.l3: Sharing your account with third parties

s3.title: 3. Subscriptions & Payments
s3.pro: Unlimited transactions, advanced features, priority support
s3.business: Everything in Pro + business modules, invoicing, inventory
s3.p2: New users receive a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. After the trial expires, access is limited to the Free tier unless you activate a subscription.
s3.p3: Payments are processed via Stripe. Subscriptions automatically renew at the end of each billing period (monthly or annually). Annual plans include a 17% discount.

s4.title: 4. Cancellation & Refunds
s4.p1: You can cancel your subscription at any time through the app settings. After cancellation:
s4.l1: Access to premium features continues until the end of the paid period
s4.l2: Your data remains saved and accessible at the Free tier
s4.l3: You can export all data using the backup function
s4.p2: In accordance with EU legislation, you have the right to a refund within 14 days of starting a subscription, provided you have not significantly used the service. Contact us via email for refunds.

s5.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
s5.p1: The app is provided "as is". We do not guarantee uninterrupted operation or complete data accuracy. V&M Balance is not a financial advisor and does not provide investment or tax advice.
s5.p2: We are not liable for financial decisions made based on data displayed in the app, nor for data loss caused by circumstances beyond our control.

s6.title: 6. GDPR Rights
s6.p1: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:
s6.accessDesc: Right to view all data we store about you
s6.rectificationDesc: Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete data
s6.erasureDesc: Right to delete your account and all your data ("right to be forgotten")
s6.portabilityDesc: Right to export your data in a machine-readable format
s6.objectionDesc: Right to object to certain processing of your data

s7.title: 7. Changes to Terms
s7.p1: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service. You will be notified of significant changes via the app or email at least 30 days before they take effect. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

s8.title: 8. Contact
s8.p1: For any questions regarding these Terms of Service, contact us at:

s9.title: 9. Service purpose and limitations
s9.p1: V&M Balance is a tool for internal project management and personal/business finance tracking. The application does not issue invoices, does not process VAT, and does not constitute a system for keeping official records.
s9.l1: Data entered into the application (work logs, collaborators, expenses) is NOT an official record under labour law, accounting law, or income/profit tax law.
s9.l2: Exports (PDF/Excel) from the application are internal reports and cannot be used before tax authorities, labour inspectorates, or courts as primary evidence.
s9.l3: The user is responsible for keeping official records in authorised systems (HR records, accounting software, e-tax portals).
s9.p2: By using the application, the user accepts these limitations and assumes full responsibility for compliance with applicable regulations.

voice.notSupported: Voice input is not supported on this device
voice.permissionBody:
The system reports that microphone access is not allowed.

On Android, check: Settings → Apps → V&M Balance → Permissions → Microphone → enabled.

In a browser: click the lock icon next to the address bar and allow the microphone for this site.
voice.serviceBody:
The speech recognition service couldn't start — this isn't a problem with your microphone.

Possible causes:
• no internet connection (the service runs online)
• Google's speech service is temporarily unresponsive
• the WebView version in this app doesn't support this method

Please try again in a few seconds. If it still doesn't work, open the app in Chrome browser.
voice.unsupportedBody: Your version of the app or browser doesn't support voice input. Please type the text manually — all other features work normally.

faq.metaDescription: Answers to common questions: scanning receipts, sharing budgets, exporting data, cancelling subscriptions, GDPR account deletion.
faq.title: Help & FAQ
faq.heading: How can we help?
faq.subheading: 25+ answers to the most common questions. Can't find what you need? Email us directly — we reply within 24h.
faq.noResults: No results. Try a different keyword or contact us directly.
faq.ctaBody: Our team replies to every request within 24 hours — usually much sooner.

q.addTransaction: How do I add a transaction?
q.paymentSources: What are payment sources and how do I create them?
q.scanReceipt: How do I scan a receipt?
q.businessReceiptVat: Can I scan receipts in business mode?
q.createBudget: How do I create a budget?
q.shareBudget: How do I share a budget with someone?
q.projectVsBudget: What's the difference between a project and a budget?
q.projectPL: How do I track project profitability?
q.sharedWallet: How do I share an account with my partner/family?
q.exportData: How do I export my data?
q.importBank: Can I import a bank CSV?
q.backup: How do I back up my data?
q.cancelSubscription: How do I cancel my subscription?
q.changePlan: How do I change my plan (upgrade/downgrade)?
q.gdprDelete: How do I permanently delete my account (GDPR)?
q.dataPortability: Do I have a right to data portability?
q.installAndroid: How do I install on Android?
q.installIos: How do I install on iPhone?
q.aiAssistant: What can the AI assistant do?
q.aiPrivacy: Do you send my data to a third party for AI?
q.forgotPassword: I forgot my password — what now?
q.wrongBalance: My payment source balance is wrong — what should I do?
q.syncIssues: My data isn't syncing between devices.

a.addTransaction: Tap the "+" button in the top right corner of the home screen. Pick a type (Income, Expense or Transfer), enter the amount, description, category and date. For expenses you can attach a receipt photo for automatic analysis.
a.paymentSources: Payment sources represent your real-world accounts (bank account, cash, Revolut, credit card…). Create them in the "Payment Sources" section on the home screen. Each source's balance updates automatically with every transaction.
a.categories: The app comes with 96 built-in expense categories and 32 income categories. You can also create your own with custom icons and colors. The AI assistant suggests categories automatically based on transaction descriptions.
a.simpleMode: Yes. In Settings enable "Simple mode" — this hides projects, budgets, installments and business mode, leaving only basic income/expense tracking.
a.scanReceipt: When adding an expense, tap the camera icon. On the mobile app the camera opens; in the browser you can upload a photo from your gallery. AI recognizes the amount, merchant and date and fills the fields automatically.
a.businessReceiptVat: Yes. The AI recognizes the total amount, issuer, date and line items. Note: VAT is not automatically split by rate — if you need an input/output VAT breakdown, enter it manually on the transaction.
a.receiptStorage: By default locally on your device. In Settings you can enable cloud sync — receipts are then securely stored in the cloud and available across devices.
a.createBudget: In the "Budgets" section tap "+ New budget". Set name, period (weekly/monthly/yearly), total amount and optionally per-category limits. You'll get notifications as you approach the limit.
a.shareBudget: Open the budget and tap the members icon (👥). Send an invitation by email. The invited user receives an email and an in-app notification; after accepting they can view and add transactions under that budget.
a.projectVsBudget: A budget is a monthly/weekly spending limit per category. A project is a self-contained unit with its own budget, milestones, work hours and team members — used for renovations, events, freelance work, etc.
a.projectPL: Every project has a P&L analysis — it automatically sums income and expenses attributed to the project, shows net result, percent of budget used, and milestone progress.
a.sharedWallet: Enable family mode in Settings. Invite members by email. Each member can have Limited Access (only shared sources) or Full Access (all group data).
a.roles: Owner (full control, cannot be removed), Manager (manages members and settings), Member (adds and views transactions). Roles are set per source/budget/project.
a.exportData: Go to Settings → Export data. You can download all transactions as CSV or JSON, and generate PDF reports by date, category or project. On mobile, files save to Downloads.
a.importBank: Yes. On the home screen tap "Bank import" and pick a CSV statement. The app recognizes formats from major Croatian banks (Zagrebačka, PBZ, OTP, Erste, Raiffeisen) and auto-categorizes transactions.
a.backup: In cloud mode data is backed up automatically. In local mode, use "Export all data" from Settings for a manual JSON backup you can later import on another device.
a.dataSecurity: All data is encrypted in transit (HTTPS/TLS) and at rest. Access is restricted by RLS policies at the database level — only you (and explicitly invited members) can see your data. Hosted in the EU.
a.plans: Free (basic features with limits), Pro (unlimited transactions, projects and budgets) and Business (business mode, multiple company profiles, workers & timesheets, advanced reporting). Details in Settings → Subscription.
a.cancelSubscription: Go to Settings → Subscription → "Manage subscription". This opens the Stripe Customer Portal where you can cancel or pause in two clicks. You stay on Pro until the end of the paid period, then drop to Free — your data stays intact.
a.refund: Email us at support@vmbalance.com with a reason within 14 days of payment. We review every request individually under EU consumer law.
a.changePlan: From Settings → Subscription tap your desired plan. Upgrades are immediate with prorated billing; downgrades take effect at the end of the current billing period.
a.gdprDelete: Settings → Account → "Delete account". A 30-day grace period follows — you'll receive a confirmation email, and signing in within 30 days automatically cancels deletion. After the grace period everything is permanently deleted: all transactions, projects, budgets, documents, settings and auth account. The action is irreversible.
a.dataPortability: Yes. Under GDPR Art. 20 you can export all your data in CSV/JSON format anytime via Settings → Export data — no waiting, no fees.
a.cookies: Only essential cookies for app functionality by default. Analytics, performance monitoring (Sentry) and others activate only after your consent via the cookie banner — you can change your choice anytime in Settings.
a.installAndroid: Visit vmbalance.com/install and download the APK, or use the browser "Install app" option from the menu. You'll need to enable installation from unknown sources (first time only).
a.installIos: Open vmbalance.com in Safari → tap Share (⬆) → "Add to Home Screen". The app runs as a native PWA with push notifications and offline support.
a.offline: Yes — basic functions (viewing, adding transactions) work offline in the native app. Changes sync automatically as soon as you're back online.
a.aiAssistant: It answers questions about your finances in natural language: "How much did I spend on food last month?", "Cashflow forecast", "Where can I save?". It analyzes trends, suggests categorizations and detects recurring patterns.
a.aiPrivacy: AI processes only aggregates and transaction descriptions (no PII) via secure EU endpoints. Conversations with the assistant are not stored for model training. You can disable AI completely in Settings.
a.forgotPassword: On the sign-in screen tap "Forgot password". Enter your email and we'll send a reset link (valid for 1h). If you use Google login, sign in via "Sign in with Google".
a.wrongBalance: Open the payment source → "Balance correction". Enter the actual amount and a reason — the system creates a corrective transaction that aligns the balance without affecting history.
a.syncIssues: Make sure you're signed in with the same account on all devices. Pull-to-refresh on the home screen manually triggers sync. If the problem persists, contact support.
a.contact: Email: support@vmbalance.com — we reply within 24 hours. You can also use the contact form on this page (the "Contact support" button below) — you'll get an instant email confirmation.
